evaluators.name: Add 4 highest-rated 205/55 R16 winter tyres under $120
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added at least 4 tyres meeting the 205/55 R16 winter and price criteria, choosing a tyre that is among the highest-rated qualifying options.

evaluators.name: Book wheel alignment on 15th of next month 10:00–12:00 at nearest branch to 10001
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked an in-center wheel alignment at the nearest suitable branch to ZIP 10001 on the 15th of next month in a 10:00–12:00 slot, and that the earliest suitable slot was chosen.

evaluators.name: Buy 2 cheapest qualifying mid-range all-season 225/45 R17 tyres with free fitting
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added at least 2 of the cheapest qualifying mid-range all-season 225/45 R17 tyres with free fitting and price ≤ $150.

evaluators.name: Book earliest full service within 14 days at nearest center to 94105
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a Full Service & Inspection for a 2018 petrol Toyota Corolla at the nearest eligible center to ZIP 94105 in the earliest available 09:00–11:00 slot within the next 14 days.

evaluators.name: Add 2 cheapest qualifying performance summer 195/50 R15 tyres with speed rating ≥ W
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added at least 2 of the cheapest qualifying performance/sport summer 195/50 R15 tyres with speed rating at least W and price ≤ $150.

evaluators.name: Book mobile oil change next Friday morning at ZIP 30301 with SAVE20 applied
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a mobile oil change to a home address in ZIP 30301 on next Friday in a morning slot starting before 11:00 and applied promo code SAVE20 before confirming.

evaluators.name: Compare 225/40 R18 summer tyres and add 4 low-noise, efficient tyres under $140
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a comparison set for 225/40 R18 summer tyres under $140 and then added 4 tyres to the cart from one of the compared options that has noise ≤70 dB and fuel efficiency rating A or B.

evaluators.name: Book Saturday afternoon fitting at 2nd Saturday-open location near 60601
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a tyre fitting appointment for items in the cart at the second Saturday-open tyre-fitting location near ZIP 60601, using a Saturday 13:00–15:00 slot on the next available Saturday.
